chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2076 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 08.12.2025. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G Sindh a/w Akhtar Hussain (DSP / SDPO Saddar SBA) and ASI Muhammad Paryal on behalf of SHO PS SITE, Kotri. ***************************************** None present on behalf of the Petitioner. This Petition has been filed by Mst. Farzana and Mahnoor seeking following directions; a) That this Honourable Court may graciously be pleased to direct Respondents No.1 to 10 to provide legal protection to the Petitioners against any threats, harassment, or harm at the hands of Respondent No.11. b) That this Honourable Court may further be pleased to restrain Respondent No.11 from harassing, threatening, or otherwise interfering in the peaceful life of the Petitioners, and direct Respondent No.11 to submit a written undertaking before this Honourable Court that he shall not harass or cause any harm to the petitioners in future. c) That this Honourable Court may graciously be pleased to conduct enquiry against Respondents No.9 to 10 who made the Fotte Khatta in the record of rights inspite of the Petitioner No.1 is alive. d) Any other relief which deems fit and proper may please be awarded to the petitioner. Page 2 of 2 The learned A.A.G has filed comments on behalf of SSP, Shaheed Benazirabad, SSP, District Jamshoro, Assistant Commissioner, Nawabshah and Incharge SITE Kotri PS, which are taken on record. Learned A.A.G present in Court submits that official Respondents will act strictly in accordance with law and will provide due protection to the Petitioners within four corners of law.

Page 2 of 2 The learned A.A.G has filed comments on behalf of SSP, Shaheed Benazirabad, SSP, District Jamshoro, Assistant Commissioner, Nawabshah and Incharge SITE Kotri PS, which are taken on record. Learned A.A.G present in Court submits that official Respondents will act strictly in accordance with law and will provide due protection to the Petitioners within four corners of law. In view of the above statement of learned A.A.G, the instant Petition stands disposed of with directions to concerned SHO(s) to act strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the Petitioners, as and when approached. However, it is made clear that this order shall not affect proceedings, if any, already pending against the Petitioners before the competent Court(s) of law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
